notes: No validation-contract assertion IDs are mapped directly to the mission-wrapup milestone because the only completed implementation feature in this milestone, `final-readme-refresh`, has an empty `fulfills` list.

No services were required for setup or teardown because `.factory/services.yaml` defines only flake-backed compiler commands and no long-running processes.
